title: Paddan #6307
definition:
Padan or Padan-aram = "field"

 1) a plain or tableland in northern Mesopotamia in Aram, a region
    of Syria
nasbUsage:
Definition: Padan or Padan-aram = "field"

 1) a plain or tableland in northern Mesopotamia in Aram, a region
    of Syria

    NASB:  the place where Rachel died
